articles.title: Apple TV is now an EGOT after Schmigadoon!’s Tony wins
articles.description: The Broadway adaptation of Apple TV’s Schmigadoon! won 4 Tony Awards tonight, officially making Apple TV an EGOT winner. Here’s what that means. more...

articles.title: Amid AI-led layoffs, Walmart tells employees it will improve their jobs, not replace them
articles.description: As concerns grow over AI-driven job cuts, Walmart is pitching a different vision. The retail giant says artificial intelligence will help employees work smarter rather than make them redundant, as it expands AI tools across its business and trains staff to use technologies including OpenAI's models.

articles.title: AI reshaping diplomacy: Can technology replace human understanding?
articles.description: As global tensions rise, governments are turning to AI to analyse data, model negotiation outcomes and identify compromise options, reshaping modern diplomacy

articles.title: AI Czar David Sacks responds to Anthropic’s 10,000-plus word ‘warning’ on dangers of Al, says You compare it to nukes... then...
articles.description: AI safety firm Anthropic warns of existential AI risks, citing recursive self-improvement and potential human obsolescence. This comes after their AI, Claude, wrote over 80% of their code. Despite this, White House AI Czar David Sacks accuses Anthropic of hypocrisy, suggesting their warnings aim for government industry control. Anthropic proposes a global pause on AI development.

articles.title: Jaipur imposes internet ban ahead of major anti-encroachment drive
articles.description: Jaipur administration has imposed a temporary internet ban to maintain law and order ahead of a JDA anti-encroachment drive. The drive aims to widen a road and involves demolishing five religious structures, prompting precautionary measures.

articles.title: Honda June 2026 Discounts - Save Up To Rs 70,000 On Elevate, City And Amaze
articles.description: Honda is offering discounts on its all three models this June: Amaze, City pre-facelift, and Elevate. The incentives include cash discounts, exchange bonuses and extended warranties. Read on to learn more.

articles.title: Vivo V70 Lite 5G Launched With 50-Megapixel Sony Camera, Dimensity 7400 Turbo SoC: Price, Specifications
articles.description: The Vivo V70 Lite 5G has been silently launched in the UAE. The handset is the fourth member of the V70 lineup, which already comprises the Vivo V70, V70 Elite, and V70 FE. The latest smartphone is powered by the MediaTek Dimensity 7400 Turbo processor, coupled with 8GB of RAM. It sports a 6.77-inch AMOLED screen and has a 50-megapixel Sony primary camera. The Vivo V7...

articles.title: India’s first ever 'RailOne Self-Ticketing Zone' to launch in Kerala before Onam
articles.description: Indian Railways is launching its first RailOne Self-Ticketing Zone in Kerala. Discover how these high-tech hubs will cut station queues and offer ticket discounts.

articles.title: Internet Shutdown, 3,000 Cops Deployment: Why Is Jaipur Under Strict Vigil?
articles.description: The Jaipur Divisional Commissioner ordered the suspension of mobile internet and social media services across Jaipur North and Jaipur East police districts from midnight on June 7.

articles.title: Signet City is a new 'fungalpunk' RPG from the creator of Citizen Sleeper
articles.description: Citizen Sleeper creator Gareth Damian Martin has revealed their latest game, Signet City. The new RPG casts players as a fungal parasite in a dying city.

articles.title: Sunday Reboot: Intel support is on its last legs this WWDC
articles.description: WWDC's keynote will celebrate macOS 27 , but it will also be a funeral for Intel Macs. The final countdown for their apps starts tomorrow. If only Apple keynotes gave blunt advice... The introduction of Apple Silicon immediately put a timer on the Intel Mac experience. Apple Silicon was the company's new direction, and that everyone should migrate that way or be left behind. Evolve or die. Except less morbid and that it really dealt with software and hardware support. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Weekly deals: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra price drops, the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL is still cheaper
articles.description: As a reminder, Amazon pulled Prime Day forward this year and it is now scheduled for June 23-26. The retailer already has early Prime Day deals that you may want to have a peek at. In the meantime, here are the standard deals – no subscription required. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 512GB is down to $1,220, which is a bit lower than it was a couple of weeks ago. The phone is clearly the big seller this generation as the other two S26 models get no discounts at all. We’re highlighting the 512GB model in particular as the 256GB version has a noticeably smaller discount, so it’s only $45 less...

articles.title: Use tech to strengthen rly safety: CM
articles.description: UP CM Yogi Adityanath orders tech-driven GRP modernisation, tighter RPF-police coordination, anti stone-pelting drive, crowd control and women’s safety on trains.

articles.description: UP CM Yogi Adityanath seeks revamped 2026 startup policy, proposing a dedicated startup mission and incentives for deep-tech, jobs, and inclusivity.

articles.description: Including a magnetic stand cover, detachable keyboard, and a garaged stylus with fast charging support, this Chromebook is versatile and built to last all day. And it's $230 off right now!

articles.title: Little Finder Guy joins Clarius the Dogcow in the 2026 WWDC swag bag
articles.description: The WWDC swag bag for 2026 has arrived, with attendees getting a bag, a bottle, and a collection of pins, including one of Little Finder Guy. WWDC 2026 swag bag - Image Credit: Canoopsy/X Each year, visitors to Apple Park taking part in the WWDC festivities can pick up exclusive Apple merchandise from the on-site Apple Store. At the same time, attendees can pick up a swag bag, made specifically for the developer event. The 2026 swag bag was picked up by Canoopsy, who posted pictures to X on Sunday. The merchandise consists of: Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: iPhone Fold photo leak, Nvidia RTX Spark is official, Week 23 in review
articles.description: Another week, another couple of foldable iPhone stories. The first is a big one, coming straight from Ice Universe; it's a photo of the device in the wild. The photo shows the White/Silver finish of the inaugural foldable and confirms its stocky shape. Another rumor claims the foldable iPhone will have a vapor chamber for cooling. It's not surprising, given that the iPhone Pro models have a vapor chamber. Motorola unveiled the Edge (2026) for the US and Canadian markets. The phone brings a smaller 6.3-inch display than its predecessor and will go on sale on June 11 with a $600 price...

articles.title: Zojila Tunnel breakthrough to create all-weather Kashmir-Ladakh link
articles.description: The final breakthrough of the 13.15-km Zojila Tunnel on June 9 will establish all-weather connectivity between Kashmir and Ladakh. The tunnel, at an altitude of 11,578 feet, will be the world's longest single-tube bi-directional road tunnel.

articles.title: The Best Smart Air Conditioners for 2026
articles.description: You can control or schedule a smart air conditioner from your phone, saving you big bucks on energy bills when you're away from home. We've rounded up the top smart ACs we've tested to help make your buying decision a breeze.

articles.title: OpenAI plans major ChatGPT overhaul focused on AI agents and coding tools
articles.description: OpenAI is reportedly transforming ChatGPT into an AI-powered super app centered on autonomous agents, coding tools, and enterprise-focused services

articles.title: Vivo X300 Ultra review: The closest a smartphone has come to replacing your camera
articles.description: Vivo's X300 Ultra emerges as a formidable contender for smartphone photography enthusiasts, boasting a ZEISS-developed triple-lens system with exceptional consistency and color accuracy. While its premium price tag and optional photography kit cater to a niche market, the device delivers DSLR-like quality, particularly in portrait and zoom capabilities, making it a compelling choice for those prioritizing camera performance.

articles.title: Point, Click, Build: Cursor’s new design mode makes AI coding more intuitive
articles.description: New feature allows developers to point, click and annotate live applications so AI agents can understand design changes more accurately.

articles.title: JEE Advanced AAT Result 2026 out at jeeadv.ac.in; here's how to check
articles.description: IIT Roorkee has released the JEE Advanced Architecture Aptitude Test (AAT) Result 2026. Candidates can check their qualifying status on jeeadv.ac.in. Successful candidates are eligible for B.Arch admissions at IITs, but final selection depends on JEE Advanced rank and JoSAA counselling. The AAT result only indicates qualification, not marks or ranks.

articles.title: Why is the Trump administration talking about giving Americans a stake in AI companies?
articles.description: An idea once associated with the political fringes is suddenly being discussed in Washington: what if ordinary Americans owned part of the AI boom alongside companies such as OpenAI?

articles.title: Weekly Pet Parents Horoscope, June 07 to June 13, 2026: What the stars say about your bond with your pets
articles.description: This week, pets across the zodiac are exhibiting unique behaviors influenced by planetary movements. From Aries pets' energetic stubbornness to Pisces' role as emotional support specialists, each sign's companion is making their presence known. Owners will find their routines and bonds with their animals significantly impacted by these distinct astrological influences.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro Max leak reveals three possible colours as Apple reportedly sticks with aluminum frame
articles.description: iPhone 18 Pro Max leak: A new leak suggests the iPhone 18 Pro Max will feature an aluminum frame in three new colors: Dark Cherry, Cloudy Blue, and Black. This comes alongside rumors of a modest battery upgrade for the iPhone 18 Pro, with the US version potentially getting a 4,288mAh battery.

articles.description: The revamped ChatGPT is expected to shift from a simple conversational chatbot to a task-oriented AI assistant capable of performing complex actions

articles.title: Weekly numerology prediction, June 07 to June 13, 2026, based on the first letter of your name
articles.description: This week, subtle shifts in communication and relationships are highlighted. Pay attention to repeated actions and quiet reassurances, as they carry more weight than grand pronouncements. Unexpected detours and delayed responses may lead to clearer understanding. Trust behaviour over words, and notice where genuine ease already exists. Embrace the unfolding of events rather than forcing a rigid plan.

articles.title: Weekly poll: will you buy the Motorola Razr Fold?
articles.description: Motorola joined the flip foldable market pretty early on with the Razr 2019, a few months before Samsung unveiled the Galaxy Z Flip (a delayed launch meant that these two arrived very close together). However, Samsung had kicked things off with a book-style foldable the year before, while Motorola took this long to make its first. The Motorola Razr Fold is already available in multiple regions, starting with the UK and Europe, then India, the US and Canada. Motorola Razr Fold The Razr Fold features a 6.6” cover display, a 21:9 LTPO panel with 1080p+ resolution and up to...

articles.title: Donald Trump amplifies bizarre AI music video portraying him as an icon
articles.description: Donald Trump shared a surreal AI-generated music video on Truth Social. Created by a Republican candidate, it depicts Trump as a global icon in bizarre scenarios like riding a lion and being on the moon, with lyrics praising his global popularity.

articles.title: In A First, Vijay Promotes 300 Engineers Of Tamil Nadu Power Body
articles.description: Orders were issued in the first phase to 300 assistant executive engineers (electrical) out of 379 eligible engineers who joined service between 2000 and 2002

articles.title: Indian Army Seeks Indigenous Mortar Specialist Vehicle to Boost Precision Firepower
articles.description: The Indian Army has issued a Request for Information (RFI) for a new Mortar Specialist Vehicle (MSV) to modernize infantry fire support. This wheeled platform will automate fire data for 81mm and 120mm mortars, enhancing accuracy and enabling "shoot and scoot" tactics.

articles.title: Donald Trump Has A New AI Idea: Let The Public Have A Stake In Big Tech
articles.description: Donald Trump wants Americans to have a stake in AI companies. Here's what the proposal means and why concerns over powerful AI models are growing.

articles.title: CrowdStrike CEO George Kurtz warns against rising AI spending by companies, and it is not about job losses, but ‘dangerous’ ...
articles.description: CrowdStrike CEO George Kurtz warns that unchecked AI spending is creating significant security vulnerabilities, not job losses. He likens the rapid evolution of AI-powered cyber threats to the iPhone's disruptive impact, compressing disruption timelines into months. A new AI model can now automate complex attack chains, making anyone a potential cyberhacker, threatening businesses and national security.

articles.title: Rajasthan PTET Admit Card 2026 Expected Today, Here's How To Download
articles.description: Rajasthan PTET Admit Card 2026 is likely to be released today.

articles.title: SpaceX inks $30 billion deal to provide Google with AI computing power
articles.description: SpaceX reached a similar deal last month to provide Anthropic, another leading AI lab, with computing power.

articles.title: Etihad to expand widebody fleet, targets 8% rise in flights by June 15
articles.description: Etihad Airways is ordering more widebody aircraft and expects to fly about 8% more by mid-June as demand recovers, CEO Antonoaldo Neves said, adding that the airline aims to avoid empty seats rather than cut flights.

articles.title: Chennai-born Trump AI architect quits White House
articles.description: In a noteworthy development, Sriram Krishnan, an influential strategist behind Donald Trump's AI agenda, will be leaving his position at the White House. His next endeavor aims to confront critical artificial intelligence issues that impact America and its allies.

articles.title: AI is replacing workers faster than ever in 2026. Here's which industry is taking the biggest hit
articles.description: AI-driven layoffs in the US have already exceeded the combined total of 2024 and 2025, with the technology sector accounting for the largest share of job cuts, according to a new Challenger report.
